title: tests: set `--jobs=1` for flaky `bud-multiple-platform-no-run`
body:
We have a recorded bug here https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3710
but complexity of this bug fix is looking high as of now with fixes
going into multiple components.

See dicsussion here: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3710

Reducing jobs for this test will ensure that we process things in serial
order so instead of skipping this test we can still run it in a serial
manner and with no flakes

**Note: This does not fixes the underlying issue but just removes flakes from CI**

@rhatdan @cevich @edsantiago @nalind PTAL. This is not a fix but should keep CI calm till original issue is closed/fixed upstream.
I'll undraft this this if we decide to hide the problem in CI for now.

Change LGTM
I'll let others decide if this is warranted or not.  I'd lean towards no.
LGTM. I'm okay with this as a temporary workaround.
